title: (Bullish Signal) ACAD, enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Dec 08, 2020
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that ACAD's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. A.I.dvisor backtested 89 similar cases where ACAD's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 74 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 83%. Current price $52.96 crossed the resistance line at $53.72 and is trading between $53.72 resistance and $52.02 support lines. Throughout the month of 11/05/20 - 12/08/20, the price experienced a +11% Uptrend, while the week of 12/01/20 - 12/08/20 shows a -5% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/sig73mt8z6461.png?width=1528&format=png&auto=webp&s=29013c473fd9655fb61a12543c727f93f85219b6

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator demonstrated that the ticker has stayed in the oversold zone for 2 days, which means it's wise to expect a price bounce in the near future.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on December 08, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on ACAD as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 74 of 89 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

ACAD moved above its 50-day Moving Average on September 29, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 50-day Moving Average for ACAD moved above the 200-day moving average on November 23, 2020. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +1.41% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where ACAD advanced for three days, in 252 of 312 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 183 of 218 cases where ACAD Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 84%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8200798-acadia-pharmaceuticals-acad-54-06-enters-uptrend-as-momentum-indicator-ascends-above-0-level-on-dec-08-2020?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=signal)
